title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Bajaj Auto Global Group

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Bajaj Auto Global Group
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Bajaj Auto Global Group in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Auto Global Group:
Bajaj Auto Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Auto Global Group!
